summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Account Management feature (iteration 6). All 30 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI fully verified: /manage-accounts page loads for admin with account list, tier badges, search filter. Account detail panel shows MRR, Users, Jobs, Credit Balance. All 4 action modals work (Change Tier, Grant Add-on, Add Seats, Add Credits). Audit log displays admin actions with timestamps. Non-admin users correctly denied access (redirected and no Manage link in nav).
critical_code_review_comments: Admin endpoints correctly protected with verify_admin_user dependency - returns 403 for non-admin
Navigation.js correctly checks user.role === 'admin' before showing Manage link
App.js renders AdminAccountManager at /manage-accounts with user prop
Account detail fetched from /api/admin/accounts/{id} with tier_price, credit_balance, audit_log
All admin actions (tier change, addon grant/revoke, seats, credits) log to admin_audit_log collection
Change Tier modal correctly disables current tier option with 'Current' label
Credit balance defaults to 0 in backend if not present in account document
All action forms include optional 'reason' field for audit trail context
seed_data_creation: Backend tests added 2 seats and R1000 credits to TechCorp SA Updated account. Test addon grants were reverted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Account Management fully tested. Page at /manage-accounts shows 4 accounts with tier badges. Search filters by name/email/tier. Clicking account shows detail with MRR, Users, Jobs, Credit Balance and 4 action buttons. All modals tested: Change Tier (4 options, current disabled), Grant Add-on (12 options), Add Seats (+/- selector), Add Credits (input + quick-select). Audit log shows all admin actions with timestamps. Non-admin redirected from /manage-accounts.

manage_accounts_page_loads_for_admin.details: Admin user sees Account Management page at /manage-accounts with title, subtitle, account list

non_admin_cannot_access.details: Recruiter redirected from /manage-accounts to dashboard, no Manage link in navigation

account_list_shows_4_accounts_with_tier_.details: List shows Global Recruitment (Enterprise), FinTech SA Test (Pro), ExecuHire (Growth), TechCorp SA Updated (Starter)

search_filters_accounts.details: Search by tier 'Enterprise' filters to 1 account (Global Recruitment Agency)

account_detail_panel.details: Shows account name, email, tier badge, MRR (R 6 899), Users (1), Jobs (3), Credit Balance (R 1 000)

change_tier_modal.details: Modal shows 4 tier options (Starter, Growth, Pro, Enterprise) with prices, current tier shows 'Current' label and is visually disabled

change_tier_api.details: PUT /api/admin/accounts/{id}/tier changes tier, sets subscription_status to active, logs to audit

grant_addon_modal.details: Modal shows 12 add-ons list (scrollable), active ones would be disabled

grant_addon_api.details: POST /api/admin/accounts/{id}/addon creates addon with admin_granted=true, expires 1 year, logs to audit

revoke_addon_api.details: DELETE /api/admin/accounts/{id}/addon/{purchase_id} deactivates addon, logs to audit

add_seats_modal.details: Modal shows quantity selector with +/- buttons, reason field, and submit button

add_seats_api.details: POST /api/admin/accounts/{id}/seats adds extra_users_count, logs to audit

add_credits_modal.details: Modal shows amount input with R prefix, quick-select buttons (R500, R1000, R5000, R10000), shows new balance preview

add_credits_api.details: POST /api/admin/accounts/{id}/credits adds to credit_balance, logs to audit

credit_balance_displayed.details: Credit Balance shown in green highlight box with data-testid='credit-balance'

audit_log_displays.details: Admin Activity Log section shows all actions with timestamps: Credits Added, Seats Added, Add-on Revoked, Add-on Granted, Tier Changed

admin_account_detail_api.details: GET /api/admin/accounts/{id} returns full account with tier_name, tier_price, owner, job_count, active_addons, credit_balance, audit_log

admin_endpoints_return_403_for_non_admin.details: All admin account endpoints return 403 for recruiter auth token

navigation_shows_manage_for_admin_only.details: Manage link visible in admin nav, hidden for recruiter nav

mocked_integrations.payfast: Sandbox mode - Payfast payment gateway is in sandbox mode for testing
